metadata.focus: Mask-locked weights, edge power budget, real-time inference
metadata.methodology: Co-design thinking - algorithms designed for hardware constraints

ternary_implementation.challenge: Precise multi-level resistance control is difficult
ternary_implementation.solution: Binary RRAM with 2 cells per ternary weight (one for positive, one for negative)

key_advantages: In-memory computing eliminates weight fetch energy
Natural support for ternary {-1, 0, +1} via resistance states
Potential for 100x energy efficiency vs digital
key_challenges: Endurance: 10^6-10^12 cycles (OK for inference, bad for training)

research_findings.memristor_ternary_nn: Ternary Neural Networks Based on on/off Memristors (2022) demonstrates ternary weight encoding
research_findings.rram_cim_macro: ADC-less RRAM-based Computing-in-Memory achieves binary CNN at <1pJ/op
research_findings.4t2c_edram: Ternary eDRAM cell for vector-matrix multiplication in memory array

rram_computing.recommendation: Strong candidate for mask-locked inference. Consider hybrid: RRAM for weights, SRAM for activations

key_challenges: Size: MZI arrays are large (mm-scale per operation)
EO conversion overhead negates savings for small batches
Not compatible with standard CMOS (needs photonics layer)
Precision limited by device fabrication tolerances

research_findings.lightmatter: Photonic AI accelerator startup, Series C funded
research_findings.lighton: Optical computing for ML, focusing on cloud
research_findings.intel_photonics: Silicon photonics for data centers, not edge

photonic_computing.recommendation: Not ready for edge deployment. Consider for future (3-5 year) roadmap if power targets cannot be met with electronic approaches

accuracy_estimate.neural_network_tolerance: NNs are error-tolerant, acceptable for inference

core_concept.representation: Numbers as probability P(1) in random bit stream
core_concept.ternary_extension: Two bit streams: sign stream + magnitude stream

ternary_implementation.approach_1: Separate sign and magnitude stochastic streams
ternary_implementation.weight_encoding: Pre-computed stochastic bit patterns stored in ROM
ternary_implementation.activation: Generate stochastic stream from deterministic value

key_advantages: Tiny hardware: entire MAC unit in ~10 gates
Fault tolerant: bit errors have minimal impact
Clock frequency can be very high
key_challenges: Long bit streams needed for precision (latency)
stochastic_computing.recommendation: Interesting for small networks. For 3B parameter LLM, the bit-stream processing overhead likely outweighs benefits. Consider for attention score computation where precision requirements are lower

latest_techniques.name: BitNet b1.58 (Microsoft, 2024-2025)
latest_techniques.performance: Matches FP16 Llama of same size on language tasks

latest_techniques.name: QSPEC (2025)
latest_techniques.innovation: Shares weights across activation modes, zero overhead draft model

latest_techniques.name: Mixed-Precision (INT4/INT8)
latest_techniques.description: Critical layers use INT8, others INT4

sota_quantization.key_insight: Ternary (1.58-bit) achieves near-INT8 accuracy with 4x storage savings vs INT8. For mask-locked chips, ternary is the sweet spot: high accuracy, minimal hardware, perfect for hardwiring

neuromorphic.relevance: HIGHLY RELEVANT for event-driven edge inference

spiking_ternary_combo.research: Ternary Weight Spiking Neural Networks (TW-SNN) - UTS 2022
spiking_ternary_combo.description: Combines ternary quantization with spiking activation
spiking_ternary_combo.power: Ultra-low power due to sparse activation
spiking_ternary_combo.accuracy: Comparable to artificial NNs on image tasks

intel_loihi2.llm_support: Limited - designed for SNNs, not ANNs

qualcomm_hexagon.type: Neural processing unit, not true neuromorphic

key_advantages: Event-driven: power only when neurons fire
Temporal processing natural for sequential data
Online learning possible on some platforms
key_challenges: Rate coding requires many timesteps for precision
LLM architectures not yet optimized for spiking
neuromorphic.recommendation: Monitor closely. Spiking transformers may emerge as optimal edge LLM architecture in 2-3 years. For now, use ternary ANN with event-driven activation patterns

FULLY_FIXED.rationale: Mask-locked weights eliminate memory access, 10-100x energy savings
FULLY_FIXED.constraint: Cannot change model without new chip

SEMI_FIXED.rationale: KV cache size determines max sequence, some flexibility valuable
SEMI_FIXED.implementation: Configurable SRAM allocation, fixed arithmetic precision

FULLY_RECONFIGURABLE.rationale: These must be mutable for inference

architecture_recommendation.datapath: Fixed-function systolic array for matrix operations
architecture_recommendation.memory: SRAM for KV cache + activations (200-500MB target)
architecture_recommendation.io: Simple serial interface (UART/SPI) for token I/O
architecture_recommendation.configurability: Boot-time parameters for sequence length, temperature

novel_approaches.name: In-Memory Computing (IMC) with SRAM
novel_approaches.description: Perform analog computation directly in SRAM arrays
novel_approaches.key_reference: 2T1C DRAM PIM architecture supports dual-mode Boolean and MAC operations (2024)

novel_approaches.name: Carbon Nanotube Tensor Processor
novel_approaches.maturity: Research (Peking University 2024 - world's first CNT TPU)

novel_approaches.name: Speculative Decoding for Edge
novel_approaches.description: Draft model proposes tokens, main model verifies in parallel
novel_approaches.relevance: IMMEDIATE - can implement on mask-locked chip
novel_approaches.implementation: Hardwire both draft (100M params) and main (3B params) models on same die

novel_approaches.name: Flash-Based Compute-in-Memory
novel_approaches.description: Use flash memory cells for analog computation
novel_approaches.advantage: High density, multi-bit per cell possible
novel_approaches.relevance: Medium - good for very large models (>10B params)

novel_approaches.name: Analog Computing with Mixed-Signal
novel_approaches.relevance: High for CNNs, unproven for transformers
novel_approaches.consideration: ADC/DAC overhead may negate benefits for small batches

top_recommendation.approach: Ternary-Weight Mask-Locked Systolic Array with Hybrid IMC
rationale: TERNARY WEIGHTS: BitNet b1.58 proves ternary achieves 97% of FP16 accuracy with 4x storage savings
MASK-LOCKED: Eliminates weight memory access entirely, 10-100x energy reduction
SYSTOLIC ARRAY: Optimal for matrix operations, well-understood design patterns
HYBRID IMC: Use SRAM-based in-memory compute for activations, leverage research on 2T1C architectures
SPECULATIVE DECODING: Include small draft model (100-300M params) on same die for 2-3x throughput boost
research_needed: SPICE-level simulation of hardwired weight routing vs SRAM read energy
INT8 KV cache quantization accuracy impact study
Optimal draft model size for speculative decoding with mask-locked main model
Yield analysis for weight metal layer density
Licensing clarification for Gemma 2 / Qwen 2.5 hardware embedding

risk_mitigation.obsolescence: Target stable model families (Llama ecosystem), plan upgrade cycle
risk_mitigation.quantization: Dual-track development: ternary primary, INT8 fallback
risk_mitigation.fabrication: FPGA prototype first, MPW shuttle before production mask
risk_mitigation.market: Start with developer/maker market, expand to industrial IoT

competitive_moat: Physical embodiment of model is difficult to replicate
Weight routing optimization is process-specific know-how
First-mover in sub-$50 edge LLM category
Mask-locking is architectural, not just RTL - harder to copy

phase_1.name: Feasibility Study
deliverables: Cycle-accurate simulator for ternary mask-locked architecture
FPGA prototype of core compute unit

conclusion.feasibility: HIGH - Technical approach validated by BitNet research
conclusion.market_opportunity: Sub-$50 edge LLM chip category is uncontested
conclusion.risk_level: MEDIUM - Semiconductor startup risks mitigated by mature process node
conclusion.recommendation: PROCEED with Phase 1 feasibility study immediately
